mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, patient_id, encounter_no, encounter_type, dept_name, attending_doctor_id, start_at, end_at, source_system, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM encounter WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO encounter ( tenant_id, patient_id, encounter_no, encounter_type, dept_name, attending_doctor_id, start_at, end_at, source_system ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{patientId}, #{encounterNo}, #{encounterType}, #{deptName}, #{attendingDoctorId}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{sourceSystem} )
mapper.update: UPDATE encounter SET patient_id = #{patientId}, encounter_no = #{encounterNo}, encounter_type = #{encounterType}, dept_name = #{deptName}, attending_doctor_id = #{attendingDoctorId}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, source_system = #{sourceSystem} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
